data.body: Second review BLOCK remediation: accepted f5b425d33beebfb85 with the exact six-value PlanRelationSnapshotError reason enum. Resolved f8735b571ba976cb5 and duplicate concurrency advisories by making ownership explicit: this story captures/verifies the clean tickets-tracker HEAD token; 5967 alone owns mismatch retry, lock-time recheck, atomic commit, and production-path tests. Accepted other substantive feedback by grounding tracker_head_sha in the repository git helper, defining exact module homes and log fields, treating 7c27 as the future criterion owner, covering enabled/disabled config, quoting executable verification commands, replacing negative surface ACs with regression tests, making build_manifest pins optional-byte-compatible, updating attest re-exports, and enumerating ordinary sign, drift refresh, and re-sign callers. Rerunning before any downstream review.
